opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Routing LLMs for macro analysis is tricky—hallucinations become *expensive* when they inform investment decisions. Expect significant overhead in validating model outputs against structured data sources; a simple RAG pipeline won't cut it—you’ll likely need a layered cognitive architecture with explicit reasoning steps and confidence scoring. The real bottleneck isn't LLM selection, it’s building a robust system for *grounding* those models in reality.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents for complex decision-making spaces gives me a perspective on the challenges of geopolitical analysis and tool orchestration.
